preparationRules.rule: Must be sliced thin and fully cooked through, no pink
Fat must be completely trimmed off

members.name: Órla

preparationRules.rule: Mash or cut into finger-safe strips

members.notes: 6 months, no teeth yet. BLW-style finger foods plus purees.

recipes.name: Grilled taco chicken
recipes.ingredientsText:
600g chicken breast
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp chili powder
0.5 tsp garlic powder
Juice of 1 lime
recipes.directions:
1. Slice chicken breast into thin strips or flatten to even thickness.
2. Mix olive oil, cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, and lime juice in a bowl.
3. Toss chicken in the marinade and let sit 10-15 minutes.
4. Grill or pan-fry over high heat, 3-4 minutes per side until cooked through.
5. Slice against the grain before serving.

recipes.name: Black bean taco filling
recipes.ingredientsText:
2 tins black beans, drained
1 medium onion, diced
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp cumin
0.5 tsp chili powder
Juice of half a lime
recipes.directions:
1. Sauté diced onion in a little oil until soft, about 4 minutes.
2. Add garlic, cumin, and chili powder; cook 1 minute.
3. Add drained black beans and a splash of water.
4. Mash roughly with a fork, leaving some beans whole.
5. Cook 5 minutes until thickened. Squeeze lime juice over and stir.
recipes.defaultPrep: Sauté onion, add beans and spices, mash roughly.

recipes.name: Quick yogurt-lime sauce
recipes.ingredientsText:
200g plain yogurt
Juice and zest of 1 lime
Small bunch cilantro, chopped
recipes.directions:
1. Mix yogurt, lime juice, and lime zest in a bowl.
2. Finely chop cilantro and stir in.
3. Season with a pinch of salt. Serve cold.
recipes.defaultPrep: Stir yogurt, lime, and cilantro together.

recipes.name: Basic pizza dough
recipes.ingredientsText:
500g flour
7g sachet yeast
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp salt
325ml warm water
recipes.directions:
1. Mix flour, yeast, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add warm water and olive oil; stir until a shaggy dough forms.
3. Knead on a floured surface for 8-10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
4. Place in an oiled bowl, cover, and let rise 1 hour until doubled.
5. Punch down and divide into 2-3 balls. Ready to stretch and top.
recipes.notes: Dough freezes well. Wrap balls individually in cling film for the freezer.

recipes.name: Quick pizza sauce
recipes.ingredientsText:
1 tin tinned tomatoes
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp oregano
1 tbsp olive oil
Pinch of salt and sugar
recipes.directions:
1. Heat olive oil in a small pan over medium heat.
2. Add minced garlic, cook 30 seconds.
3. Add tinned tomatoes, oregano, and a pinch each of salt and sugar.
4. Simmer 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
5. Blend or mash to desired smoothness.
recipes.defaultPrep: Simmer tomatoes with garlic and oregano.

recipes.name: Simple tray pizza
recipes.ingredientsText:
1 batch pizza dough (or 500g flour + 7g yeast + oil/sugar/salt/water)
1 tin tomatoes (or batch of pizza sauce)
250g mozzarella, sliced or torn
Fresh basil leaves
recipes.directions:
1. Preheat oven to 220°C / 425°F.
2. Stretch dough to fit an oiled baking tray.
3. Spread pizza sauce evenly over the dough.
4. Scatter mozzarella over the top.
5. Bake 15-20 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbling.
6. Top with fresh basil leaves. Slice and serve.
recipes.defaultPrep: Stretch dough on tray, top, and bake.
recipes.notes: Use store-bought dough or a flatbread base for a faster shortcut version.

recipes.name: Basic pasta bake sauce
recipes.ingredientsText:
2 tins tinned tomatoes
1 medium onion, diced
3 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp italian seasoning
1 tbsp olive oil
Salt and pepper to taste
recipes.directions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Sauté diced onion until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and italian seasoning; cook 1 minute.
4. Pour in tinned tomatoes, stir, and bring to a gentle simmer.
5. Cook 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce is rich and thickened.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
recipes.defaultPrep: Sauté onion, add tomatoes and seasoning, simmer.

recipes.name: Roasted broccoli
recipes.ingredientsText:
1 large head broccoli, cut into florets
2 tbsp olive oil
2 cloves garlic, sliced
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions:
1. Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F.
2. Cut broccoli into bite-sized florets.
3. Toss with olive oil, sliced garlic, salt, and pepper on a baking tray.
4. Spread in a single layer.
5. Roast 20-25 minutes until edges are crispy and browned.
recipes.defaultPrep: Toss florets with oil and garlic, roast until crispy.

recipes.name: Plain seasoned rice
recipes.ingredientsText:
300g rice
1 tbsp olive oil or butter
Salt
recipes.directions:
1. Rinse rice under cold water until water runs clear.
2. Combine rice and 1.5x volume of water in a pot with a pinch of salt and olive oil.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce to lowest heat and cover.
4. Cook 12-15 minutes until water is absorbed.
5. Remove from heat and let steam, covered, for 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork.

recipes.name: Simple cheese sauce
recipes.ingredientsText:
30g butter
30g flour
500ml milk
100g cheese, grated
0.5 tsp mustard
recipes.directions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually whisk in milk, a splash at a time, to avoid lumps.
4. Keep stirring until sauce thickens and begins to simmer, about 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat, stir in grated cheese and mustard until smooth.
recipes.defaultPrep: Make a roux with butter and flour, whisk in milk, melt cheese.

recipes.name: Simple tomato soup
recipes.ingredientsText:
2 tins tinned tomatoes
1 medium onion, diced
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp italian seasoning
750ml water or vegetable stock
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Sauté onion until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and italian seasoning; cook 1 minute.
4. Pour in tomatoes and water or stock; bring to a simmer.
5. Cook 15-20 minutes, then blend until smooth.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
recipes.defaultPrep: Sauté onion and garlic, simmer tomatoes, blend.

recipes.name: Spaghetti bolognese
recipes.ingredientsText:
400g pasta
500g ground beef
500ml passata
1 medium onion, diced
2 cloves garlic, minced
recipes.directions:
1. Finely dice onion and mince garlic.
2. Brown ground beef in a large pan; drain excess fat if needed.
3. Add onion and garlic; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Pour in passata, season with salt and pepper, and simmer 20-30 minutes.
5. Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente.
6. Drain and toss with sauce, or serve sauce over pasta.
recipes.defaultPrep: Simmer beef ragu while cooking spaghetti; toss to serve.

baseMeals.name: Pasta with chicken and broccoli
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Cook pasta. Grill or pan-fry protein. Steam veg.
wasteReuseHints: Leftover pasta works for next-day lunch

baseMeals.name: Salmon with rice and peas
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Cook rice. Pan-fry salmon. Heat peas.

baseMeals.name: Fish fingers with beans and bread
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Oven fish fingers. Heat beans. Toast bread.

baseMeals.name: Taco night
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Grill or pan-fry seasoned protein. Warm tortillas. Chop lettuce. Mix sauce. Assemble tacos at the table.
wasteReuseHints: Leftover grilled chicken works in rice bowls or salads
Extra black bean filling freezes well

baseMeals.name: Pizza night
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Make or thaw dough. Make sauce. Stretch dough, top, and bake at high heat.
wasteReuseHints: Leftover pizza sauce keeps 5 days in the fridge

baseMeals.name: Pasta bake

components.prepNote: Use jar sauce or make from scratch

baseMeals.defaultPrep: Cook pasta. Make or heat sauce. Toss with veg, pour into baking dish, top with cheese. Bake until golden.

baseMeals.name: Rice bowl
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Cook rice. Roast or steam veg. Grill protein. Assemble bowls with soy sauce drizzle.
wasteReuseHints: Leftover rice keeps 2 days in the fridge
Roasted broccoli works as a side for other meals

baseMeals.name: Cheesy pasta (rescue)
baseMeals.defaultPrep: Cook pasta. Make cheese sauce (roux + milk + cheese). Toss together.
wasteReuseHints: Add leftover veg to bulk it out
